issue.title: `simd::cat` return type requires inefficient ABI tag change/conversion

discussion.p: The return type of `simd::cat` is defined using deduce-abi-t rather than `resize_t`. This can lead to:
Setting priority to P2, after (Fix LWG4470: Fix integer-from in [simd]), resolving the issue was accepted on telecon.
discussion.note: 2026-04-01 Resolved by the adoption of at Croydon, 2026. Status changed: New → Resolved.
